news.summary:
pete hegsETH addressed the irgc, stating that the u.s. is aware of the movement of iranian military assets and where they are being deployed.

he said the united states armed forces can rapidly shift from major combat operations to enforcing a “world-class blockade,” and warned that they could escalate further if needed.

hegsETH added that, under instructions from donald 트럼프, the u.s. will ensure that iran never obtains a nuclear weapon, saying this could be achieved either through a negotiated deal or through military pressure.

news.title:
cz: sbf asked for a $6b bailout as casually as ordering a sandwich 

binance founder changpeng zhao
news.summary:
cz: sbf asked for a $6b bailout as casually as ordering a sandwich 

binance founder changpeng zhao (cz) @cz_binance  stated in an april 14 interview with fox business that just before ftx's collapse, sbf mumbled a request for funds, constantly changing the amount from $2 billion to $6 billion, "as casually as ordering a sandwich." cz noted that very few people have that kind of massive cash lying around, bluntly stating that the situation was full of lies and fraud. 

additionally, cz described his experience writing a book in prison: using a terminal with only a messaging program, a 15-minute typing limit per session, no copy-and-paste functionality, and a 3,000-character limit per message. these extreme conditions forced him to quickly 하락 his thoughts, which actually pushed him to complete the "shitty first draft" of his new book.

news.title:
arthur hayes: market in “no-trade zone” amid ai deflation risks and geopolitical uncertainty

arthur
news.summary:
arthur hayes: market in “no-trade zone” amid ai deflation risks and geopolitical uncertainty

arthur hayes said the market is in a “no-trade zone,” driven by deflationary pressure on the credit and financial system from ai replacing knowledge workers, alongside uncertainty stemming from middle east tensions. he noted that under different scenarios, 비트코인 may face short-term pressure alongside risk assets.

however, hayes argued that amid rising energy and commodity prices and expanding fiscal spending, central bank monetary expansion would favor fixed-supply assets such as 비트코인 and gold, while cash flow–based assets remain under pressure. in this environment, he is maintaining a wait-and-see stance, watching for liquidity signals, and only gradually increasing exposure to gold and hyperliquid (hype).

news.summary:
the 이더리움 foundation (ef), in conjunction with secureum, the red guild, and the security alliance (seal), released a closing report on the ETH rangers project, identifying approximately 100 north korean (dprk) it workers from various teams.

launched in late 2024, the project aimed to fund independent researchers providing public security services for the 이더리움 ecosystem, recovering or freezing over $5.8 million in funds and reporting or documenting over 785 vulnerabilities and client-side exploits.

fatih birol, executive director of the international en
news.summary:
europe has "maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left"

fatih birol, executive director of the international energy agency, warned that europe may have “maybe 6 weeks or so” of jet fuel left if major supply routes remain disrupted due to the ongoing iran-related conflict.

he cautioned that flight cancellations within europe could appear soon if fuel stocks continue to decline.

news.title:
quantum-linked stocks are skyrocketing:

south korean firms ictk and axgate 급상승ed +30% and reached t
news.summary:
quantum-linked stocks are skyrocketing:

south korean firms ictk and axgate 급상승ed +30% and reached their daily trading limit during wednesday’s session.

at the same time, china's guochuang software and quantumctek, along with japan's fixstars, each 급등d at least +8%.

over the last week, ictk and axgate are up +60% and +141%, respectively.

this comes as nvidia, $nvda, launched a new collection of open-source ai models on tuesday, aimed at accelerating quantum computing and making it scalable for practical use.

meanwhile, the global quantum computing market is projected to more than quadruple to over $11.0 billion by 2030, from ~$1.7 billion in 2024.

quantum computing is accelerating.

news.title:
the "buy now, pay later" crisis:

47% of buy now, pay later (bnpl) users were late in paying their b
news.summary:
the "buy now, pay later" crisis:

47% of buy now, pay later (bnpl) users were late in paying their bnpl loans over the last year.

this percentage has risen +6 points from 2025 levels and +13 points over the last 2 years.

high-income borrowers, young adults, men, and parents of young kids are among the most likely to miss payments.

this comes as 25% of borrowers now hold three or more active bnpl loans at once, driven by gen z and millennials.

furthermore, 29% of users are now turning to these loans for groceries, and 20% for restaurant delivery or takeout.

transactions using bnpl loans are expected to 급등 to a record $687 billion in volume by 2028, from $334 billion in 2024.

americans are increasingly “fighting” 인플레이션 with more debt.

as a result, nvidia's ceo jensen huang has described current market conditions as the "인플레이션 point" in ai.

news.title:
us home sellers are increasingly cutting prices:

a record 34.2% of home sellers lowered their list
news.summary:
us home sellers are increasingly cutting prices:

a record 34.2% of home sellers lowered their list price in february, the highest for any february since records began in 2012.

since 2022, the percentage of sellers cutting prices has more than tripled.

sellers who cut prices cut by an average of $40,915, or -7.3%, the highest february percentage since 2023 and the 2nd-highest since 2017.

among all sellers, the average price was reduced by $13,463, or -2.4%, the highest for this month on record.

home sellers in texas and florida led the price cuts, while sellers in the bay area cut the least.

elevated mortgage rates and rising housing inventory continue to weaken seller pricing power across the country.

the us housing market is increasingly favoring buyers.

에센피는 다시 빠르게 반등해서 ath 찍었는데.. 
크레딧은 반등폭을 못 따라가고 있는게 찜찜한 부분이야.  

저거
news.summary:
에센피랑 하이일드 크레딧 스프레드랑 저렇게 갭이 떴어.. 

에센피는 다시 빠르게 반등해서 ath 찍었는데.. 
크레딧은 반등폭을 못 따라가고 있는게 찜찜한 부분이야.  

저거 흰색선을 쉽게 설명해주자면,  
cdx hy cdsi gen 5y 가 뭐냐면, 미국 하이일드(정크) 기업들의 신용위험을 보여주는 대표 cds 지수 (5년물) 이야.  

그래서 스프레드가 확대될 수록, 기업들의 부도 리스크도 올라가고 금융 스트레스가 올라가고, 경기도 나쁜거지.  물론 여기 차트에서는 에센피랑 비교를 위해서 inverted 로 표기해서 반대로 해석해야 되고.  

그러니까 크레딧도 조금 개선되긴 했는데, 에센피가 지금 평소대비 혼자 너무 오바해서 슈팅하고 있다는 소리야.

news.summary:
유럽 캠프 홍보…

어느 덧 3회차에 접어드는 music astra 컬쳐 캠프.
음악만이 아닌 건축, 미술, 식도락 등 문화 그 자체를 느끼고 차이를 이해하여 더 폭넓고 자유로운 사고를 할 수 있는 것에 중점을 두고 계획합니다.
목표는 더 깊게 사색하고 나 자신을 찾아가는 원천이자 윤활유 역할을 하는 시간을 경험으로 가득 채워오자!

<엑설런트 퀄리티 컬쳐 캠프>
전반적인 계획은 이렇습니다

7/4 (토) 오전 출발-> 밤 독일 freiburg 도착

7/5 sokolov 독주회 감상 in freiburg

7/6 masterclass by prof.mishory 한곡 레슨받고 청강.

7/7 freiburg 즐기기

7/8 건축 탐구-
-르 꼬르지뷔에의 롱샹 성당,
-자하 하디드,안도 다다오,헤르쪽 표앤 드 드뫼롱,프랑크 게리 등 세계적인 건축가들의 건물이 모여있는 비트라 캠퍼스 vitra campus

7/9 basel kunstmuseum 미술사의 걸작이 모여있는 박물관.
-스위스에서 가장 오래된 호텔이자 grand hotel le trois rois 에서 티 타임.

7/10 france alsass wein 알자스 지역 양조장 탐방
-strassbourg 성당

7/11 freiburg 즐기기

7/12 france 동화속에서 튀어나온 중세도시 colmar 콜마 관광
-bamberg symphony 감상 in colmar

7/13 shloss heidelberg 괴테가 가장 아름다운 성으로 극찬했던 하이델베르그 성 방문
저녁 frankfurt 공항 출발

7/14(화) 오전 서울 도착

식사는 자유롭게 원하는 메뉴로 진행하며
식당은 가장 유럽에서 맛있게 먹을 수 있는 중/고급 레스토랑에서 하게 됩니다

유럽 내에서의 이동은 mercedes benz 미니 버스를 대절하여 움직입니다

호텔은 레지던스 호텔의 꼭대기층,펜트 하우스이며 freiburg 시내 가장 중심가에 위치합니다
방 4개 화장실 4개라서 총 8명까지만 제가 직접 인솔/설명 합니다.

매일 여유롭게 유럽을 현지 s 클래스로 즐기실 분들 알려주세요

news.title: 🇫🇷 éric robic, who killed an israeli woman in a 2011 tel aviv hit-and-run and fled the country, was
news.summary:
🇫🇷 éric robic, who killed an israeli woman in a 2011 tel aviv hit-and-run and fled the country, was shot dead near paris

according to reports, two helmeted men on a scooter approached him, opened fire, and fled the scene within seconds. the motive for the attack remains unclear.

robic had previously been convicted in france in connection with the death of lee zeitouni, who was struck while crossing a street in tel aviv in 2011. 

after the murder, robic and another french national left israel, leading to a prolonged legal process before they were eventually tried and sentenced in france.

news.title: 🇱🇹 lithuanian border guards detained 30 migrants who crossed from an underground tunnel at the borde
news.summary:
🇱🇹 lithuanian border guards detained 30 migrants who crossed from an underground tunnel at the border with belarus.

on april 6, in the afternoon, the video surveillance system in the vilnius district recorded an unusual case of border violation. a group of 30 migrants illegally crossed the border within a few minutes through an underground tunnel.

according to reports, they are citizens of afghanistan, iraq, and pakistan, with only some presenting identity documents.

news.title: 🇹🇷 in diyarbakır, a man called the police saying, “i have a gun, i’m drunk, i’m going to shoot aroun
news.summary:
🇹🇷 in diyarbakır, a man called the police saying, “i have a gun, i’m drunk, i’m going to shoot around,” before going to a public square and opening fire randomly.

a police officer passing by the scene intervened and neutralized the shooter.

news.title: huge lines forming in front consulates in almeria, spain today as tens of thousands illegal migrants
news.summary:
huge lines forming in front consulates in almeria, spain today as tens of thousands illegal migrants start the regularization process.

spanish pm pedro sanchez has passed a regularization law that will give amnesty to up to 800 000 illegal migrants.

news.summary:
🇹🇷 video has surfaced showing the school shooter, i̇sa aras mersinli, who killed 9 people and injured 20 in kahramanmaraş, practicing shooting at a range alongside his father prior to the attack.

news.title: in odesa, emergency rescue operations have been completed at the site of a russian strike on a resid
news.summary:
in odesa, emergency rescue operations have been completed at the site of a russian strike on a residential building.

eight people were killed, and 16 were injured. in total, 22 people were reported injured across the city following the mass shelling.

news.title:
russians have published a video showing a drone strike on a ukrainian passenger train in kherson

th
news.summary:
russians have published a video showing a drone strike on a ukrainian passenger train in kherson

the attack may be part of the so-called “kherson safari,” a sadistic “entertainment” of russian drone operators targeting civilians and civilian vehicles from the occupied left bank of the city as a form of training.
